team_name: NYAY – Turning Court Judgments into Clear Action Plans for Government Officers
summary: Develop an AI system, NYAY, to read court judgment PDFs, extract key information, generate a structured action plan, and ensure human-verified data is presented in a dashboard for government use.
optimization_claims: Directly connected to CCMS for automatic processing of judgments
Converts complex legal language into real calendar deadlines with alerts
Tracks patterns across all judgments over time and surfaces legal vulnerabilities
constraints_addressed: Focus on decision support, not full automation
